---
title: "Research"
---

# Research Themes

- Long-term care
  - Community-oriented care
  - Care process
  - Dementia
  - Parkinson's disease
  - Patient-led research
- Urban planning
  - community design code
  - vacant houses
  - Niigatalogy
- Geographical information system
  - R/sf/geojp
  - QGIS プラグイン開発
